creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 184988
file list

And `make check-orphans` again, NO PROBLEM. 
Furthermore, the port SHOULD NOT install reconnectwm.sh but installs reconnectwm.sh.sample. Why you have reconnectwm.sh? See attached file list. 

% sudo make check-orphans               
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)           
===> Parsing plist            
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist  
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR                                                          
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)
